scenarios.title: Creating a Widget returns the stored entity

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a GET request to "/widgets/widget-spec-1"

scenarios.title: Creating a Widget without name is rejected

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
the response field "error.message" is a string

scenarios.title: Creating a Widget with a non-decimal price is rejected

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":"1.5","in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
the response field "error.message" is a string

scenarios.title: Creating a Widget with a non-bool in_stock is rejected

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":"yes","category_id":"category-seed-1"}
the response field "error.message" is a string

scenarios.title: Creating a Widget with an invalid price is rejected

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":-1,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
the response field "error.message" is a string

scenarios.title: Fetching a missing Widget returns not found

steps.text: I send a GET request to "/widgets/widget-spec-missing"
the response field "error.message" is a string

scenarios.title: Updating a Widget persists the change

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a PUT request to "/widgets/widget-spec-1" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 6","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a GET request to "/widgets/widget-spec-1"
I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a DELETE request to "/widgets/widget-spec-1"
I send a GET request to "/widgets/widget-spec-1"

scenarios.title: Creating a Widget increases the list count

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a GET request to "/widgets"

scenarios.title: Filtering widgets by category_id returns only matching rows

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a GET request to "/widgets?category_id=category-seed-1"

scenarios.title: Creating a Widget increases the reported count

steps.text: I send a POST request to "/widgets" with body {"id":"widget-spec-1","name":"Sample name 5","price":5.5,"in_stock":false,"category_id":"category-seed-1"}
I send a GET request to "/widgets/stats"
